title: Dekton 17pc Smartphone Repair Set-Ideal for Mobile Device Repairs| Durable Storage Case Included| Complete Set with Opening Lever, Sim-Slot Opener, Bit Holder, Screwdriver Bits, Suction Cup Many More
features: Ideal for Mobile Device Repairs: The Dekton 17pc Smartphone Repair Set is specifically designed for repairing and maintaining a wide range of mobile devices. Whether you’re fixing a cracked screen, replacing a battery, or handling intricate internal components.

Complete Set with Essential Tools: This repair set includes a diverse assortment of tools, such as an opening lever, SIM-slot opener, bit holder, suction cup, and multiple screwdriver bits. The variety of tools ensures that you can handle different types of screws and components, making it a versatile kit for various smartphone repair tasks.

Durable Storage Case Included: The set comes with a durable storage case designed to keep all your tools organized and easily accessible. The case features compartments and a secure closure to prevent tools from shifting or getting lost. Its compact and portable design allows for convenient storage and transport.

High-Quality Materials for Longevity: Each tool in the Dekton Smartphone Repair Set is crafted from high-quality materials to ensure long-lasting durability. The screwdriver bits are made from hardened steel to withstand frequent use and resist wear, while the plastic tools are designed to be sturdy yet gentle on delicate smartphone components.

Ergonomic and User-Friendly Design: The tools in this set are designed with user comfort in mind. The ergonomic handles of the screwdrivers provide a comfortable grip, reducing hand fatigue during extended repair sessions. The precise design of the opening lever and SIM-slot opener ensures ease of use.
description: The Dekton 17pc Smartphone Repair Set is your ultimate solution for all mobile device repairs, combining precision, durability, and comprehensive functionality in one expertly crafted toolkit. This all-in-one repair kit is specifically designed for tackling a wide range of smartphone issues, from screen replacements to battery swaps, making it an indispensable addition to any tech enthusiast's or professional technician’s toolkit. The set includes 17 essential tools and accessories that cover every aspect of mobile device repair. Key components include an opening lever, a SIM-slot opener, and a bit holder, ensuring that you have the right tools for precise disassembly and reassembly. The screwdriver bits are crafted from high-quality materials to provide optimal performance and longevity, allowing you to handle various screws and components with ease. For added convenience, the set features a suction cup to facilitate screen removal without causing damage and a durable storage case to keep all components organized and readily accessible. The case is designed for portability and protection, ensuring that your tools remain in excellent condition and are easy to transport from one job site to another. Each tool in the Dekton Smartphone Repair Set is engineered to meet high standards of quality and functionality, providing you with reliable performance and accuracy. The comprehensive range of tools ensures that you are well-equipped to handle various repair tasks, making it a practical and valuable addition to your repair arsenal.

specifications_table.Included Components: ‎1 x Bit holder, 1 x Sim-slot opener, 1 x Suction cup, 2 x Opening lever, 3 x Cross (PH000-00-0), 2 x Slot (0.3x1.5mm, 0.4x2mm), 4 x Torx (T4, T5, T6, T7), 2 x FiveStar Pentalobe (0.8mm, 2.0mm), 1 x TriWing (Y1)
